title: Funni Optimization
description: This mod pack is determined to make your game as smooth as possible. No stuttering or frame dips allowed.
body:
- This mod pack is determined to make your game as smooth as possible. 
- There are no game play changes made in the pack, and no new content has been added, only fixes and fps enhancers. 
- Some examples of such enhancers are: sodium, noisium, packet fixer, debugify, etc.
- This mod pack may or may not be allowed on servers; be sure to read the server rules first.
- Reduces stuttering in game drastically.
